title: Regency Centers to Present at Citi's 2023 Global Property CEO Conference
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Feb. 28, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: REG) today announced that Lisa Palmer, President and Chief Executive Officer, is scheduled to make a presentation at the 2023 Citi Global Property CEO Conference (the “Conference”) on Tuesday, March 7, 2023, at 1:40 pm ET. To access the Company's live presentation, use the webcast registration link below.

title: 10 High-Yield Dividend Stocks To Help You Generate Income
text: In this article, I will present 10 companies that could help you generate an additional income. All the picks that I present in this article provide you with an attractive Dividend Yield.

title: Regency Centers: A Strong Grocery-Anchored REIT Trading At A Premium To Peers
text: Regency Centers owns a large portfolio of grocery-anchored stores and community centers leased to a diversified group of over 8K tenants. In addition to strong portfolio metrics, the company boasts of one of the lowest levered balance sheets among their peer set.

title: Regency Centers Corporation (REG) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Regency Centers Corporation (NASDAQ:REG ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 10, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Christy McElroy - SVP of Capital Markets Lisa Palmer - President and CEO Alan Roth - EVP of National Property Operations & East Region President Nick Wibbenmeyer - EVP & West Region President Michael Mas - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Michael Goldsmith - UBS Ki Bin Kim - Truist Securities Greg McGinniss - Scotiabank Floris Van Dijkum - Compass Point Craig Mailman - Citi Juan Sanabria - BMO Capital Markets Anthony Powell - Barclays Mike Mueller - JPMorgan Tayo Okusanya - Credit Suisse Paulina Rojas - Green Street Linda Tsai - Jefferies Ronald Kamdem - Morgan Stanley Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Regency Centers Corporation Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Regency Centers (REG) Q4 FFO Increases, Revenues Surpass
text: Regency Centers (REG) reports better-than-anticipated revenues in the fourth quarter due to healthy leasing activity and growth in the base rent.

title: Regency Centers Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Results
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., Feb. 09, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: REG) today reported financial and operating results for the period ended December 31, 2022. For the three months ended December 31, 2022 and 2021, Net Income was $0.56 per diluted share and $0.39 per diluted share, respectively. For the twelve months ended December 31, 2022 and 2021, Net Income was $2.81 per diluted share and $2.12 per diluted share, respectively.
